description: Cross-context replay — record_hash integrity and ARK-457 boundary

sub_cases.description: context_id changed, record_hash recomputed — boundary test
sub_cases.design_boundary_note: record_hash valid because attacker recomputed it. DENY enforced by ARK-457 5-dim context binding. Confirms: record_hash = field integrity only; context_id enforcement requires separate authorization layer.
